title: campium salicinum
intro: Campium salicinum, also known as willow-leaved campion, is a plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of Campium salicinum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Campium salicinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
